description_long: This adult male pedestrian is dressed in a coordinated, urban streetwear outfit featuring a short-sleeved, button-up baseball-style shirt layered over a tank top, paired with cropped jogger pants. The shirt has a pinstripe pattern and displays a large number '10' and stylized text on the back. His arms are adorned with visible tattoos and he wears a wristwatch and bracelet. The figure has styled, short hair and is wearing low-top sneakers. The overall appearance is casual yet fashionable, with attention to detail in accessories and body art.
description: A tattooed adult male in urban streetwear, wearing a pinstriped baseball shirt, jogger pants, and sneakers, accessorized with jewelry and styled hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open baseball shirt, tank top, tattoos, jewelry, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, arm tattoos, and layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt with the number '10' and stylized text, as well as the back of the hair and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm tattoos, and the fit of the jogger pants and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved baseball shirt over a tank top, cropped jogger pants, and casual streetwear accessories
